target: Software/IP and reverse-engineering counsel in each active jurisdiction
first_ask: Written method boundary for owned-device observation, anti-circumvention, interoperability, clean-room roles, publication and contributor eligibility
desired_result: Approved jurisdiction matrix and research protocol
fallback: Stop protected-device work; use public documentation and documented hardware only

target: Trademark search and prosecution counsel
first_ask: Clear working and fallback marks across intended classes, languages, domains and package namespaces
desired_result: Written clearance decision and filing plan
fallback: Continue using the internal Agent OS working name without public brand launch

target: seL4 Foundation / Trustworthy Systems and independent capability-system researchers
first_ask: Paid review of kernel object scope, capability semantics, IPC, scheduler and assurance plan
desired_result: Review report, research contacts and bounded collaboration
fallback: Independent academic/industry review panel

target: Genode Labs and related component-framework experts
first_ask: Review service composition, resource donation, driver isolation and interface boundaries
desired_result: Architecture feedback or consulting proposal
fallback: Internal conformance review against published material

target: BeagleBoard.org Foundation
first_ask: Board revision, boot/recovery/debug, schematics, manufacturing files, camera/display expansion and community-maintainer channel
desired_result: Named technical/community contact and supported evaluation path
fallback: Purchase retail units and rely on public design sources

target: Texas Instruments processor FAE / E2E support
first_ask: AM62/AM67 technical-reference, errata, boot, power, display, camera/ISP, accelerator and redistribution/support boundaries
desired_result: Named FAE, evaluation material and escalation path
fallback: Restrict port to publicly documented blocks and record gaps

target: NXP i.MX applications processor FAE
first_ask: i.MX 8M Plus boot, display, camera ISP, NPU, power, secure boot, lifecycle and documentation-access package
desired_result: Evaluation agreement and technical support quote
fallback: Use TI/PiSP path for reference pipeline

target: Raspberry Pi camera engineering/documentation and ecosystem partners
first_ask: PiSP/libcamera public interface map, sensor-module access, tuning/calibration and permissible reuse/publication
desired_result: Documented camera bench and community contact
fallback: Use public documentation and retail camera modules

target: PINE64 and postmarketOS device maintainers
first_ask: Exact PinePhone Pro revisions, schematics, boot, modem, power, display, audio, camera limitations and test knowledge
desired_result: Maintained target dossier and shared regression knowledge
fallback: Independent public-source bring-up with explicit Experimental support level

target: Purism / Librem 5 technical and business contacts
first_ask: Schematics/source scope, modem separation, boot, power, display/camera documentation, supply and evaluation terms
desired_result: Comparative phone-form target decision
fallback: Do not acquire if unique evidence is insufficient

target: Fairphone open-source and business-development contacts
first_ask: Supported SKU, unlock/recovery, source package, binary/firmware rights, lifecycle, camera/power boundaries and evaluation units
desired_result: Written evaluation rights and technical/business contact
fallback: Retail evaluation only; no maintained target claim

target: Sony Open Devices program
first_ask: Current supported Xperia SKU, binaries/source, boot/recovery, display/camera/radio limitations, lifecycle and evaluation route
desired_result: Program-compatible test target or documented rejection
fallback: Keep as source/reference only

target: Google AOSP/Pixel public documentation and security channels as applicable
first_ask: Clarification pointers for public unlock/restoration, responsible disclosure and published interfaces; no request for private implementation material
desired_result: Verified public boundary and disclosure route
fallback: Use only published material and owned-device black-box evidence

target: Sony Semiconductor Solutions, onsemi, OmniVision and module integrators subject to access
first_ask: Sensor/module datasheet, modes, controls, calibration, lens/actuator/OIS, supply/lifecycle, NDA/publication and support options
desired_result: At least two replaceable documented module paths
fallback: Use documented evaluation modules and software pipeline

target: Arducam, e-con Systems, Vision Components and comparable module/integration vendors
first_ask: Documented sensor modules, drivers as reference, calibration/tuning service, supply and custom carrier support
desired_result: Evaluation kit and paid support proposal with publication rights
fallback: Build reference module carrier in-house

target: Quectel, Telit Cinterion, Semtech/Sierra Wireless, u-blox and regional integrators
first_ask: Documented MBIM/QMI/AT control, firmware/update policy, lifecycle, security disclosure, GNSS, eSIM/IMS scope, certification inheritance and FAE support
desired_result: Two-module shortlist and written support boundaries
prerequisite: Native cellular contract and market assumptions
fallback: Data/SMS lab only; defer voice/IMS claims

target: Accredited RF/EMC/SAR labs, PTCRB-authorized labs, GCF resources and regional notified/assessment bodies
first_ask: Pre-compliance plan, module inheritance, required final-device tests, software-change impact, lead time and cost
desired_result: Reviewed certification matrix and budget
fallback: Internal/developer hardware only; no market placement

target: Shortlisted mobile ODM/JDM/EMS firms after architecture maturity
first_ask: RFI covering documentation/IP, boot ownership, secure provisioning, camera tuning, modem/IMS, certification, tooling, MOQ/NRE, change control and post-termination rights
desired_result: Comparable written proposals and partner scorecard
prerequisite: Requirements, cost model, manufacturing interfaces and counsel templates

target: University OS, formal methods, imaging, RF and hardware-security groups
first_ask: Scoped review, student/research collaboration, test corpus or funded project with publication and IP terms
desired_result: Independent expertise and contributor pipeline
fallback: Paid expert review and community bounties

target: Open-source foundations, public-interest technology funders, research grants and aligned sponsors
first_ask: Milestone-bound support without hidden roadmap, license, data or publication control
desired_result: Diversified funding and transparent obligations
fallback: Narrower self-funded program
